allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(data\)} recipes found'\); [print\(f'  {r[\\"title\\"]} - {r[\\"match_percentage\\"]}% match'\) for r in data[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(data\)} recipes'\); [print\(f'  {r[\\"title\\"]} - {r[\\"match_percentage\\"]}%%'\) for r in data[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f'{i[\\"id\\"]}: {i[\\"name\\"]}'\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\)[:5]]")
